stemHtml: A force majeure (e.g. natural disaster) has happenned that affects a route that normally requires visa. What should the contracting States do?

options.a: Contracting states shall NOT require visa from crew or passengers.
options.b: Contracting states shall deny entry for passengers without a visa or crew without their CMCs.
options.c: Contracting States shall require visas from crew or passengers.
options.d: Contracting States shall not require visas from passengers.
